takeaways: Market declined (Nifty -2.18%). Look for opportunities in quality stocks with strong fundamentals — dips are for accumulating, not panicking.
Sector rotation: Pharma leads (+0.3% month), Realty lags (-14.3%). Consider tilting new allocation toward sectors with strong momentum.
30 watchlist stocks show accumulate signals: EICHERMOT, HCLTECH, HDFCAMC, HEROMOTOCO, HDFCNEXT50. Build positions in 2-3 tranches; max 6% per name.
1 watchlist stocks on wait: NTPC. Avoid catching falling knives — wait for trend reversal confirmation.
Macro watch: Crude at $93.83, USD/INR at 92.92. Rising crude or weakening INR can pressure IT/pharma margins short-term but often creates accumulation opportunities in exporters.
Position sizing: Max 6% in any single name. Multi-year horizon — don't chase momentum; buy quality on weakness. Tax-efficient if held > 1 year.
learning_questions: Do you follow earnings season closely? Want per-stock earnings calendar?
Preference for dividend-paying stocks vs pure growth?
Would weekly portfolio review summaries be useful?
